exhibits.name: List of State Administrators
exhibits.notes: Standard state franchise administrator contact list

exhibits.name: List of Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Agents for service in registration states

exhibits.name: Table of Contents of Operations Manual
exhibits.notes: 166-page manual. 3 parts: A (Core Brand Standards — 14 sections), B (Operations — 7 sections), C (Staffing — 4 sections). Covers marketing, finance, compliance, service standards, food integrity, vendors, facilities, health/safety, management, recruitment, onboarding, offboarding.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Auditor consent, independent auditor's report, balance sheet (Jan 2, 2025), and notes to financial statement. Balance sheet only — $500 total assets (cash), $0 liabilities. Auditor: Metwally CPA PLLC. Clean opinion.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: 19 articles, 66+ pages. Includes schedules (Shop Location/Territory, Statement of Owners) and exhibits (Owner/Spouse Guaranty, Confidentiality, Site Selection Ack, Lease Rider, Collateral Assignment of Lease, Assignment of Phone/Digital Media, ACH Authorization, General Release).

exhibits.name: Multi-Unit Development Agreement
exhibits.notes: Development agreement for 3-5 shops. Includes Schedule A (Development Info Term Sheet).

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Two licensees with outlets not yet open: (1) Irfan Mehmood/Toheeda Sadiq-Mehmood, 8375 Elk Grove Blvd, Elk Grove CA 95758 (license agreement); (2) Ahmad Aldarawsheh/Taleen Coffee LLC, 1336 Illinois Rte 59, Naperville IL 60563 (license agreement).

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees That Have Left the System
State Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: FDD amendments and franchise agreement amendments for 14 states. Includes material overrides on forum selection, governing law, noncompete, termination, general release, and other provisions.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Lists 14 registration states and their effective dates (dates not populated in document).
